events.label: HEA 1405 enacted
events.detail: Sales-tax exemption for data centers, up to 50 years. Sets the incentive backdrop.

events.label: Amazon + Meta land in Indiana
events.detail: AWS announces New Carlisle (Project Rainier); Meta announces Jeffersonville. The hyperscale wave begins.

events.label: HEA 1007 passed
events.detail: Large-load law: purports to make data centers pay 80%+ of new power-plant costs; shortens IURC timelines and reduces oversight.

events.label: Meta Lebanon milestone
events.detail: Meta confirms its $10B, 1.5 GW LEAP campus in Boone County.

events.label: AES files Cause 46394
events.detail: AES Indiana files the Google Monrovia large-load agreement with the IURC (Apr 22, 2026).

events.label: IURC OKs Monrovia energy project
events.detail: Regulators approve the energy project tied to Google's Morgan County data center (July 2026). AES rate increase phase 1 takes effect.

events.label: IURC decision window
events.detail: Full IURC order expected on the Google/AES agreement — the moment public attention peaks.

events.label: AES rate increase phase 2
events.detail: Second phase of AES Indiana's approved 3.7% base-rate increase.

events.label: First hyperscale energization
events.detail: Projected: earliest large campuses (Amazon, Meta, Google phase 1) begin drawing significant load.

events.label: 5.6 GW new gas planned
events.detail: I&M + NIPSCO plan 5.6 GW of new gas-fired capacity by 2030 to serve the load.

events.label: Full buildout horizon
events.detail: Projected: 7.8 GW of new gas by 2035; statewide data-center load at multiples of today.
